meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Version Control: Antigravity Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and build professional-grade software apps.
content.answer_block: The absence of version control is a silent project killer. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you establish an immutable audit trail for your codebase. Pairing this with Claude Code allows you to automate commit hygiene, ensuring every feature iteration is tracked, documented, and safely recoverable for your portfolio.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen of code that represents weeks of late-night effort. Suddenly, a rogue update breaks the core functionality. Without version control, that progress is effectively vaporized, leaving you with nothing but frustration and a damaged portfolio piece. This is the reality for developers who treat their projects as static files rather than living, evolving systems.

But there is a better way. By integrating the Antigravity project template, you move from amateur script-kiddie to professional software architect. This isn't just about saving files; it's about building a robust history that demonstrates your technical maturity to future employers. Let’s transform your workflow and secure your hard-earned progress.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a professional project structure that enforces versioning from the first line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template, ensuring strict adherence to version control best practices and modular directory architecture.

steps.title: Configure Automated Commit Hooks
steps.description: Prevent 'no-version-control' syndrome by automating the commit process for every logical change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure pre-commit hooks that validate code quality and force descriptive commit messages before allowing a local save.

steps.title: Implement Feature Branching
steps.description: Isolate your experimental code so your master branch remains deployable at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated workflow for feature branching that keeps the main branch clean and production-ready.

steps.title: Audit and Rollback Simulation
steps.description: Test your version control system by intentionally introducing a bug and performing a surgical rollback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test scenario where I can simulate a codebase failure and use the Antigravity rollback tool to restore a stable state.

steps.title: Sync with Cloud Backups
steps.description: Ensure your local history is mirrored to a remote repository to prevent hardware failure loss.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a synchronization pipeline that pushes all versioned snapshots to a remote origin repository automatically.

pro_tips: Treat every commit message as a 'technical note' for your future self; keep them atomic and actionable.
Use branching to build 'Project Variants'—keep your portfolio app and your experimental sandbox in separate branches.
Run 'claude audit' before every demo to ensure your project history is clean and free of accidental credentials.
Leverage the Antigravity 'snapshot' feature to save local states before attempting high-risk refactoring.
Maintain a 'CHANGELOG.md' file automatically generated by Claude Code to track feature velocity for your resume.
content.next_steps: After mastering version control, begin integrating CI/CD pipelines to deploy your Antigravity projects automatically to a live URL for your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same version control discipline used by top-tier engineering firms. Don't let your code disappear into the ether. Build with intent, track every victory, and cement your status as a professional AI builder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
